title: Correct misspelled task type labels
content: Ensure task type labels like 'classification' are spelled correctly to avoid mismatches.
avoid: Do not use misspelled labels like 'classificaiton'.

title: Bind parent nodes for nested fields
content: Always bind parent nodes before accessing nested fields. For example, use contribution -> NLP task -> input/output.
avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when querying nested fields.

title: Follow NLP4RE contribution pattern
content: Use the pattern ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:nlp4re_contribution .
avoid: Do not attach fields directly to ?paper except for publication year.

title: Avoid unsupported query forms
content: Ensure the query form matches the expected structure for NLP4RE contributions.
avoid: Do not use unsupported query forms that lead to extraction failures.

title: Use correct predicate references
content: Ensure predicates like pgmr:implemented_approach are correctly referenced to avoid mismatches.
avoid: Do not use incorrect or misspelled predicate references.

title: Select appropriate placeholders
content: Use specific placeholders for fields like ?url or ?year based on the context of the query.
avoid: Do not use generic or incorrect placeholders that do not match the expected output.

title: Ensure answer format matches expectations
content: Format answers to match the expected structure, especially when counting or filtering.
avoid: Do not return answers in an unexpected format that leads to mismatches.

title: Limit queries to supported forms
content: Ensure queries are limited to those forms that are supported by the NLP4RE framework.
avoid: Do not attempt to use unsupported query forms that lead to extraction errors.
